subject: [PATCH v4] mm/lruvec: trace LRU add drains and drain-all requests

reviews.author: Vlastimil Babka (SUSE)
reviews.summary: Acked the patch without raising any technical concerns.

2026-06-15.patch_summary: This patch adds two new tracepoints to the Linux kernel, mm_lru_add_drain and mm_lru_add_drain_all, which allow tracing of LRU add drains and drain-all requests. The new tracepoints provide information about the CPU and lru_add batch count when an lru_add batch is drained, as well as whether callers of __lru_add_drain_all set the force flag for all CPUs.
